title: Counting with For
description: Write a loop that prints the numbers from 1 to 5.
problemStatement:
Automate repetition! Write a `for` loop that starts at `1`, continues while `i <= 5`, and increments by `1`. Print the current value of `i` on each line.

**Expected Output:** 
`1` 
`2` 
`3` 
`4` 
`5`
